create_prompt: Create New Topic Send the name for this topic (max 128 characters): Send /cancel to abort
created_msg: Topic {name} created successfully! Users can now send messages in this thread.
create_failed: Could not create topic. {error} Make sure Threaded Mode is enabled for this bot in @BotFather.
confirm_delete_msg: Delete topic "{name}"? This permanently deletes the thread and all messages in it.
name_too_short: Topic name is too short. Please enter at least 1 character.
name_too_long: Topic name is too long (max 128 characters). Please try a shorter name.
inbox_enabled_hint:
Subscribers can open support tickets by messaging your bot.
Their messages appear as threads in your inbox group.
inbox_disabled_hint: Support inbox is disabled. Configure a group to start receiving tickets.
inbox_prompt_chat_id:
Setup Support Inbox Step 1 — Add your bot to the inbox group Tap 「Add Bot to Group」 below, then pick the supergroup where tickets should appear. Step 2 — Grant admin permissions Once the bot is in the group, open its profile → Promote to Admin → enable Manage Topics. Setup completes automatically the moment the bot joins.
Already have the bot in the group? Paste the Chat ID directly: -1001234567890
inbox_auto_detected: Inbox configured automatically! Group: {group_name} Subscribers can now open support tickets by messaging your bot.
inbox_chat_id_error: Could not extract a Chat ID. Use 「Add Bot to Group」 to let the bot detect the group automatically, or paste its numeric ID: -1001234567890
inbox_verify_msg: Inbox configured! Group: {group_name} Subscribers can now open support tickets by messaging your bot.
inbox_verify_fail: Could not verify the group. {reason} Make sure the bot is an admin with Manage Topics enabled.
inbox_health_lost: Inbox Access Lost The bot was removed as admin from the inbox group or lost Manage Topics permission. Support inbox has been automatically disabled. Please re-configure.
away_on_hint: Away mode is ON. Subscribers who open a ticket will see your away message.
away_prompt: Set Away Message Send the message subscribers will see when away mode is active. Supports bold, italic, and links.
ticket_closed_notice: Ticket #{number} closed Your ticket has been resolved. Send a new message to open a fresh one.
dashboard_title: {e_support_inbox} Open Tickets Each row shows the subscriber, time opened, and message count. Close a ticket to mark it resolved.
dashboard_close_confirm:
Close ticket #{number}?

The subscriber will be notified.
group_hint: Manage forum topics and routing rules for your linked group.
group_rules_empty:
No routing rules yet.
Add a rule to auto-copy messages to a specific topic.
group_rule_keyword_prompt: Send the keyword or phrase that should trigger this rule: This will be matched against the message text and caption.
group_rule_mode_prompt: Choose how to match the keyword:
group_rule_topic_prompt: Now tap the target topic to route matching messages to:
group_no_topics: {e_warning} No topics yet. Create topics first.
group_topic_picker: Tap a topic to select it:
group_welcome_msg: {e_welcome_msg} Welcome, {name}! Glad to have you here.
no_linked_group:
No linked group found.

Create at least one topic first — that's how the bot learns which group to use.
group_list_hint: Tap a group to configure it.
group_list_empty:
No groups linked yet.

Add your bot to a Telegram group to start using Topics.
group_hub_hint: Choose how to use this group:
group_hub_remove_confirm: Remove {name} from this bot? The Telegram group itself won't be affected — this only unlinks it.
group_setup_hint: To use Topics, first add your bot to a Telegram supergroup. Step 1 — Tap 「Add Group」 and pick the supergroup. Step 2 — Open the bot's profile in that group → Promote to Admin → enable Manage Topics. Setup completes automatically once the bot joins. Already added the bot? Paste the Chat ID directly: -1001234567890
upgrade_required:
Topics & Group Management require the Advanced plan or higher.
Advanced unlocks support inbox, group topic routing, ticket assignment, and away mode.
delete_failed_permissions_toast: ❌ Could not delete this topic. Make sure the bot has the Delete Messages admin permission in the group.
group_welcome_msg_prompt: {e_edit} Type your custom welcome message. You can use these macros: • {first_name} — member's first name • {username} — @username (or first name if none) • {mention} — clickable mention link Example: {e_welcome_msg} Welcome {mention}! Introduce yourself here. Send /cancel to discard.
group_welcome_msg_default_hint: {e_info} No custom message set — using the default greeting.
group_welcome_msg_empty: {e_warning} Message can't be empty. Please try again.
group_no_topics_toast: ⚠️ No topics yet. Create topics first.
